problem_statement.title: Better handle edge case of `NULL`s in `case_when()`
problem_statement.issue_body:
Tested with devel `dplyr` and `vctrs` 0.7.1:

``` r
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)

data.frame(x = c("a", "b")) |> 
  mutate(y = case_when(x == "a" ~ NULL))
#> Error in `mutate()`:
#> ℹ In argument: `y = case_when(x == "a" ~ NULL)`.
#> Caused by error in `case_when_size_common()`:
#> ! `vec_size_common()` should have errored.
#> ℹ This is an internal error that was detected in the dplyr package.
#>   Please report it at <https://github.com/tidyverse/dplyr/issues> with a reprex
#>   (<https://tidyverse.org/help/>) and the full backtrace.

rlang::last_error()
#> <error/dplyr:::mutate_error>
#> Error in `mutate()`:
#> ℹ In argument: `y = case_when(x == "a" ~ NULL)`.
#> Caused by error in `case_when_size_common()`:
#> ! `vec_size_common()` should have errored.
#> ℹ This is an internal error that was detected in the dplyr package.
#>   Please report it at <https://github.com/tidyverse/dplyr/issues> with a reprex
#>   (<https://tidyverse.org/help/>) and the full backtrace.
#> ---
#> Backtrace:
#>     ▆
#>  1. ├─dplyr::mutate(...)
#>  2. ├─dplyr:::mutate.data.frame(...)
#>  3. │ └─dplyr:::mutate_cols(.data, dplyr_quosures(...), by)
#>  4. │   ├─base::withCallingHandlers(...)
#>  5. │   └─dplyr:::mutate_col(dots[[i]], data, mask, new_columns)
#>  6. │     └─mask$eval_all_mutate(quo)
#>  7. │       └─dplyr (local) eval()
#>  8. └─dplyr::case_when(x == "a" ~ NULL)
#>  9.   └─dplyr:::case_when_size_common(conditions = conditions, values = values, size = .size)
```

Session info
</summary>

test_patch:
diff --git a/tests/testthat/_snaps/case-when.md b/tests/testthat/_snaps/case-when.md
index 8f027cfab3..92560f8dac 100644
--- a/tests/testthat/_snaps/case-when.md
+++ b/tests/testthat/_snaps/case-when.md
@@ -165,41 +165,59 @@
       Error in `case_when()`:
       ! Can't combine `..1 (right)` <double> and `..2 (right)` <character>.
 
-# `NULL` formula element throws meaningful error
+# `NULL` formula element throws meaningful error (#7794)
 
+    Code
+      case_when(NULL ~ NULL)
+    Condition
+      Error in `case_when()`:
+      ! `..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.
     Code
       case_when(TRUE ~ NULL)
     Condition
-      Warning:
-      Calling `case_when()` with size 1 LHS inputs and size >1 RHS inputs was deprecated in dplyr 1.2.0.
-      i This `case_when()` statement can result in subtle silent bugs and is very inefficient.
-      
-        Please use a series of if statements instead:
-      
-        ```
-        # Previously
-        case_when(scalar_lhs1 ~ rhs1, scalar_lhs2 ~ rhs2, .default = default)
-      
-        # Now
-        if (scalar_lhs1) {
-          rhs1
-        } else if (scalar_lhs2) {
-          rhs2
-        } else {
-          default
-        }
-        ```
       Error in `case_when()`:
       ! `..1 (right)` must be a vector, not `NULL`.
       i Read our FAQ about scalar types (`?vctrs::faq_error_scalar_type`) to learn more.
+    Code
+      case_when(NULL ~ TRUE)
+    Condition
+      Error in `case_when()`:
+      ! `..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.
+    Code
+      case_when(c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL)
+    Condition
+      Error in `case_when()`:
+      ! `..1 (right)` must be a vector, not `NULL`.
+      i Read our FAQ about scalar types (`?vctrs::faq_error_scalar_type`) to learn more.
+    Code
+      case_when(NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE))
+    Condition
+      Error in `case_when()`:
+      ! `..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.
+    Code
+      case_when(TRUE ~ NULL, c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL)
+    Condition
+      Error in `case_when()`:
+      ! `..1 (right)` must be a vector, not `NULL`.
+      i Read our FAQ about scalar types (`?vctrs::faq_error_scalar_type`) to learn more.
+    Code
+      case_when(NULL ~ TRUE, NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE))
+    Condition
+      Error in `case_when()`:
+      ! `..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.
 
 ---
 
     Code
-      case_when(NULL ~ 1)
+      case_when(c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL, c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL)
     Condition
       Error in `case_when()`:
-      ! `..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.
+      ! Can't recycle `..1 (left)` (size 2) to match `..2 (left)` (size 3).
+    Code
+      case_when(NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE), NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE))
+    Condition
+      Error in `case_when()`:
+      ! Can't recycle `..1 (right)` (size 2) to match `..2 (right)` (size 3).
 
 # throws chained errors when formula evaluation fails
 
diff --git a/tests/testthat/test-case-when.R b/tests/testthat/test-case-when.R
index 1a49d9d588..64a859e638 100644
--- a/tests/testthat/test-case-when.R
+++ b/tests/testthat/test-case-when.R
@@ -335,13 +335,25 @@ test_that("invalid type errors are correct (#6261) (#6206)", {
   })
 })
 
-test_that("`NULL` formula element throws meaningful error", {
+test_that("`NULL` formula element throws meaningful error (#7794)", {
+  # "Must be a vector" errors
   expect_snapshot(error = TRUE, {
-    # This also triggers the scalar LHS vector RHS warning
+    case_when(NULL ~ NULL)
+
     case_when(TRUE ~ NULL)
+    case_when(NULL ~ TRUE)
+
+    case_when(c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL)
+    case_when(NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE))
+
+    case_when(TRUE ~ NULL, c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL)
+    case_when(NULL ~ TRUE, NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE))
   })
+
+  # Recycling errors come first
   expect_snapshot(error = TRUE, {
-    case_when(NULL ~ 1)
+    case_when(c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL, c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL)
+    case_when(NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE), NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE))
   })
 })

fail_to_pass: case_when(NULL ~ NULL) should error with: '`..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.'
case_when(TRUE ~ NULL) should error with: '`..1 (right)` must be a vector, not `NULL`.'
case_when(NULL ~ TRUE) should error with: '`..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.'
case_when(c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL) should error with: '`..1 (right)` must be a vector, not `NULL`.'
case_when(NULL ~ c(TRUE, TRUE)) should error with: '`..1 (left)` must be a logical vector, not `NULL`.'
case_when(TRUE ~ NULL, c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL) should error with: '`..1 (right)` must be a vector, not `NULL`.'
case_when(c(TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL, c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE) ~ NULL) should error with: 'Can\'t recycle `..1 (left)` (size 2) to match `..2 (left)` (size 3).'
pass_to_pass: case_when(c(TRUE, FALSE) ~ 1, c(FALSE, TRUE) ~ 2) returns expected values
case_when() with valid inputs continues to work correctly

key_changes: Add `.absent = -1L` parameter to both `vec_size_common()` calls in `case_when_size_common()`
Add conditional logic to handle when size_conditions == -1L or size_values == -1L
Return appropriate size value to allow downstream error handling to generate proper messages
Handle three cases: all values NULL, all conditions NULL, or both all NULL
potential_pitfalls: Forgetting to handle all three edge cases (conditions NULL, values NULL, both NULL)
Returning wrong size value that causes different error messages
Not understanding that -1L is a sentinel value indicating all inputs were NULL
Breaking existing behavior for valid inputs

instruction: Fix the bug in `case_when_size_common()` where using `NULL` in formula elements (e.g., `case_when(x == "a" ~ NULL)`) throws an internal error 'vec_size_common() should have errored' instead of a meaningful user-facing error message. The function should properly handle the edge case where all conditions or values are NULL, allowing proper error messages to be generated downstream.
context:
The `case_when_size_common()` function in `R/case-when.R` uses `vec_size_common()` to compute sizes of conditions and values. When all elements are NULL, `vec_size_common()` needs the `.absent` parameter to return a sentinel value (-1L) instead of erroring. The fix involves:

1. Adding `.absent = -1L` to both `vec_size_common()` calls
2. Handling the edge case where size_conditions or size_values equals -1L
3. Returning appropriate sizes so that `vec_case_when()` can generate proper error messages

Function signature context:
r
case_when_size_common <- function(
  conditions,
  values,
  size,
  error_call = caller_env()
)
